title: Monster-in-Law
desc: A woman finds the man of her dreams, but his mother poses a threat to their relationship.

title: Fun With Dick and Jane
desc: Jobless Dick and Jane decide to rob Jack McCallister and get their money back.

title: Sex and the City 2
desc: Four close friends go on a trip to Abu Dhabi to escape the pressures of life and love.

title: Eat Pray Love
desc: After a painful divorce, Liz decides to travel the world to discover her true self.

title: Instant Family
desc: A couple's bond with their adopted children is at stake when their birth mother returns.

title: The Bounty Hunter
desc: Milo is hired to track down his ex-wife, Nicole, for skipping bail, but things go awry.

title: Bad Teacher
desc: Upon learning about a bonus, Elizabeth strives to get her students the highest scores.

title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
desc: After FBI agent Malcolm Turner's stepson witnesses a murder, the two must go undercover.

title: Crazy Rich Asians
desc: A professor discovers that her boyfriend belongs to a family of business moguls.

title: DC League of Super-Pets
desc: Super-dog Krypto trains hard to rescue his best-friend, Superman, who has been kidnapped.

title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
desc: A private detective searches for the missing mascot of an American football team.

title: Miss You Already
desc: Milly and Jess's lives turn upside down when Milly gets diagnosed with breast cancer.

title: The Rewrite
desc: Keith, an Oscar-winning writer, teaches at a college and falls in love with a teacher.

title: The Great Dictator
desc: After suffering from memory loss, a man attempts to escape persecution from the military.

title: 50 First Dates
desc: A man falls in love with a woman whose faulty memory makes her forget him every day.

title: Shall We Dance?
desc: John, a lawyer in a dull marriage, joins a dance studio, where he is drawn to Paulina.

title: Surviving Christmas
desc: A lonely rude millionaire bribes a family to celebrate Christmas with him.

title: Peter Rabbit
desc: A spirited rivalry grows when Peter pushes boundaries and annoys Thomas McGregor.

title: What's Love Got to Do with It?
desc: A filmmaker documents her Pakistani best friend's journey to an arranged marriage.

title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
desc: An advice columnist attempts to make a man, who has made a bet, dump her in 10 days.

title: Meet the Parents
desc: Greg ends up like a hamster on a wheel of misadventures in an attempt to charm his future in-laws.

title: Stuart Little
desc: Upon getting adopted by the Littles, Stuart, a mouse, is unwelcomed by his new brother.

title: What Women Want
desc: When a middle-aged man is gifted with the power to read women's mind, he outwits his boss.

title: The Smurfs 2
desc: The Smurfs set out to rescue Smurfette after Gargamel kidnaps her due to a secret spell.

title: Fallen
desc: After witnessing Reese's execution, Detective Hobbes notices a new string of killings resembling Reese's methods.

title: Lay The Favorite
desc: Beth, an ex-dancer, dreams of being a Vegas cocktail waitress. When she teams up with gambler Dink, her unexpected talent for betting ignites jealousy in Dink's wife, Tulip.

title: The Love Laugh Live Show
desc: A cheerful show celebrating humor, life, and the joy of laughter in every moment.

title: Miss You Already
desc: The friendship between two life-long girlfriends is put to the test when one starts a family and the other falls ill.

title: Letters to Juliet
desc: Two souls connect through letters, discovering love that transcends distance and time.

title: My Best Friend's Wedding
desc: A woman revisits her past and discovers the power of true love and memories.
